evals.name: product-grid-page
evals.prompt: Build a product listing page in OneUI — a responsive grid of product cards with image, title, and price, plus a row of filter chips at the top. Give me the TSX with inline token styles.
evals.expected_output: Composition with real numeric spacing/shape tokens (--Spacing-4, --Shape-4, etc.), default surfaces for cards, pill chips. NO fictional T-shirt tokens (--Spacing-M, --Shape-M, --Spacing-3XL).

evals.name: settings-grouped-sections
evals.prompt: Create a settings page in OneUI with three grouped sections (Account, Notifications, Privacy), each a card with a few rows. Give me the TSX with token styles.
evals.expected_output: Grouped sections using real spacing tokens and shape tokens, default/subtle surfaces appropriately. NO fictional tokens. Surface-level decisions defer to the right judgment.

evals.name: signup-form-screen
evals.prompt: Build a sign-up form screen in OneUI — heading, email + password inputs, a primary submit button, and a small legal line. TSX with token styles please.
evals.expected_output: Form using real spacing tokens for vertical rhythm, real shape token for inputs (--Shape-2), pill button, Label typography. NO fictional --Spacing-*/--Shape-* T-shirt tokens.
